title: S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow Futures Ease After Another Record Close As AI Momentum Cushions Iran's Expanding Strikes: MRVL, AVGO, MSFT, PANW In Focus
sentences: S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow Futures Ease After Another Record Close As AI Momentum Cushions Iran's Expanding Strikes: MRVL, AVGO, MSFT, PANW In Focus U.S.
President Donald Trump said in a post on Truth Social on Tuesday that the U.S. and Iran deal negotiations are ongoing, dismissing reports of strained relations between the two countries.
